# Pro Se Debtors - Self-Represented Bankruptcy Guide [2026]
> Resources for pro se debtors filing bankruptcy without an attorney. Court rules, forms, and common pitfalls. 2026 guide.

## About
prosedebtors.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- My Bankruptcy Attorney Is Not Returning My Calls - What Do I Do? - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/attorney-not-responding.html
- Chapter 13 Without a Lawyer: Why It's So Hard - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/chapter-13-pro-se.html
- Filing Chapter 7 Without a Lawyer - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/chapter-7-pro-se.html
- Pro Se Bankruptcy Filing Checklist - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/checklist.html
- Pro Se Bankruptcy Mistakes That Lead to Dismissal - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/common-mistakes.html
- Bankruptcy Court Procedures for Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/court-procedures.html
- Bankruptcy Filing Document Checklist - Every Form and Document You Need - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/document-checklist.html
- Bankruptcy Forms Guide for Pro Se Chapter 7 Filers - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/forms-guide.html
- Free Bankruptcy Help: Legal Aid, Clinics, and Self-Help Resources - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/free-help.html
- Pro Se Debtors - Self-Represented Bankruptcy Guide: https://prosedebtors.org/
- Local Bankruptcy Rules - Why They Matter for Pro Se Filers - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/local-rules.html
- Pro Se Debtor Rights in Bankruptcy Court - Pro Se Debtors: https://prosedebtors.org/pro-se-debtor-rights.html
- Privacy Policy: https://prosedebtors.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
